Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Nov-20-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance by either party.
The claim of exemption is denied. Levying officer shall release funds being held to judgment creditor. Levying officer shall withhold $100 per pay period until judgment satisfied, or further court order. Commissioner: Paul Slavit. Not reported.
